scripts.build: bun --cwd packages/shared build && bun --cwd packages/server build && bun --cwd packages/ui build && bun --cwd packages/electron build
scripts.typecheck: bun --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun --cwd packages/server typecheck && bun --cwd packages/ui typecheck && bun --cwd packages/electron typecheck && bun --cwd packages/extensions/template-mcp typecheck
